title: Garlic Bread
tagline: Buttery, garlicky, and crispy on the outside. The perfect side for pasta night.
description: Crusty bread slathered with garlic butter and toasted until golden. Simple, essential, and impossible to stop eating.
steps: Mix softened butter with garlic, parsley, salt, and parmesan if using.
Spread garlic butter generously on cut sides of bread.
Place bread cut-side up on a baking sheet.
Bake 10-12 minutes until edges are golden and butter is bubbling.
For extra crispy, broil 1-2 minutes. Watch carefully.
notes: The bread: French baguette, Italian loaf, or ciabatta all work. Use day-old bread for extra crunch.
Garlic options: Roasted garlic for a milder, sweeter flavor. Raw for more punch.
Cheesy version: Add mozzarella on top for the last 3 minutes of baking.
Make ahead: Prepare garlic butter up to 1 week ahead. Refrigerate.
Freezer friendly: Spread butter on bread and freeze. Bake from frozen, adding a few minutes.
